title: 实现一级菜单顺序模型与持久化存储
stageGoal: 为一级菜单建立稳定标识、顺序归一化与显式持久化方案，使自定义排序在扩展重载后仍能恢复。
summary: Completed US-008 by adding an explicit workspace-settings persistence seam for root menu ordering, reusing submenu target ids as stable order keys, and covering both settings-file writes and restored root-menu order with regression tests.
architectureNotes: 根菜单顺序模型保持在 extension.ts 中，贴近运行时配置读取与菜单构建逻辑，避免在 localization.ts 混入持久化职责。
持久化 seam 已落到 .vscode/settings.json；这是后续扩展用户级设置或迁移配置键时的明确切分点。
建议下一个 handoff 若继续处理菜单定制，只在 rootMenuOrder 周边扩展，不要把排序逻辑散落到 showCommandMenu 或各个 submenu 节点定义中。
keyDecisions: Use submenu target ids as the canonical root-menu ordering model.
Persist harness-runner.rootMenuOrder through a dedicated workspace settings file helper.
Keep normalization tolerant of missing, duplicate, or invalid values so legacy or hand-edited settings fall back safely.
confirmedConstraints: The change scope stayed within menu-order persistence, tests, documentation, and story artifacts.
At least one relevant validation command was executed before completion.
unresolvedRisks: No user-scope persistence flow exists yet for root menu ordering; current story intentionally pins storage to workspace settings.
The full npm test suite still contains 2 known unrelated baseline failures outside the root-menu ordering area.
nextStoryPrerequisites: If future work needs per-user menu ordering, define scope-selection UX before reusing rootMenuOrder.
If reviewers ask for deeper menu sorting, split configuration shape changes from the current root-only ordering seam.
resumeRecommendation: US-008 is complete. Resume from persistWorkspacePinnedRootMenuOrderFile and the root-menu ordering tests if a reviewer requests follow-up changes or broader persistence scope.
